content.en:
"Black Wind Mountain, you deceive people too much!"

A roar was transmitted from inside the mountain gate of the Liuli Sect.

Click!

The void cracked, and a pair of miserable white hands reached out from the void crack, tearing the void crack open, forming a passage that could accommodate one person to pass through.

Immediately, a figure with cracks and wounds all over his body walked out.

The man's injuries were not easy, and even after a long period of repair, he still did not fully recover from his injuries.

And now, the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm entered the knife, as if cutting his body layer by layer, causing even more serious injuries to his body.

Under the suppression of the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the aura of this Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor continued to decline, and soon fell to the level of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

At this time, his aura was only slightly stable, but it couldn't last, at most, after half an hour, he couldn't maintain the combat power of the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"It turned out to be Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor!"

The bloody general stepped out, stopped the Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor who was about to rush over, and spoke.

"It turned out to be a bloody general, you actually survived the battle of the domain realm and the dark forbidden domain road, you are lucky! I remember that you have three top generals in the Black Wind Mountain, but now there is only one of you, and the other two generals, could it be that you have fallen?" Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor sneered.

"You're still worried about yourself, if you forcibly resuscitate this time, I'm afraid you're looking for death!"

The bloody general said with a smile.

"Even if you look for death, it will kill you!"

Yuanfeng Daozu made a move.

Bang!!!

The two exchanged hands in an instant.

At this time, Ye Tiancai really saw how terrifying the combat power of the Invincible True Ancestor was, and he didn't fall behind in fighting with a Dao Ancestor like Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor.

That every move was a great horror, compared to the Bloody General, Ye Tian felt that a Supreme True Ancestor like him would be killed if he couldn't hold a few moves at all, and the gap between the two sides was too big.

This is the real invincibility of the same level!

Subsequently, Ye Tian didn't pay attention to the battle between the Bloody General and the Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor, and the two of them would not be able to tell the winner at all for a while.

With the passage of time, the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect have fallen by more than seven percent, and the true ancestors of the Dark God Temple have fallen by more than eight percent, and the heavens and the earth are full of the corpses of the true ancestors, as well as the blood of the true ancestors, and the fragments of weapons.

The entire space has also been shattered, and I'm afraid it won't be long before this space will be scrapped.

"Damn it!"

Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor was extremely angry.

The loss of the Liuli Sect made him feel distressed, if it continued like this, wouldn't the Liuli Sect be finished?

Once the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect have fallen, what is the point of his forcible recovery this time?

So, Yuanfeng Daozu worked hard.

I saw that Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor urged a secret treasure and forcibly blocked the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for a moment, and at this moment, Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor burst out with a full force that was comparable to that of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

With this blow, he was going to kill the bloody general.

"You want to kill me? Hahaha, I once killed a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and today I will kill a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

On the side of the bloody general's momentum, holding a Dao weapon spear, the whole person seemed to have turned into an ancient spear, and his will shook the rules of the ancient realm.

At the same time, he exuded a supreme gun path intent that could crush any rule and pierce everything.

"The way of the supreme spear, no, it's half of the supreme spear path! Impossible, you are only in the realm of the true ancestor! Many Dao ancestors have only comprehended the skin of the supreme path can be called a demon, you are only the realm of the true ancestor, not only comprehended the fur, but also comprehended half of the path of the supreme spear, and reached the half-percent of the supreme spear path, this is impossible!"

Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor showed a look of disbelief and shouted.

However, in response to him was a shot from the Bloody General.

This shot ran through everything, and it also ran through Yuanfeng Daozu's body.

In a flash!

Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor's injuries were worth it, and the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm crushed down again, turning into a knife of rules that pierced his body, and this was the end of forcibly shaking the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Double damage came, and Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor's injuries were suddenly so severe that they could only maintain one Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"Die!"

The bloody general continued to stab him with a few shots, severely injuring Yuanfeng Daozu several times again.

In this way, in less than a minute, Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor completely fell and died.

Before he died, he failed to inflict heavy damage on the bloody general.

After killing Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor, the bloody general breathed a sigh of relief.

This battle was not very dangerous, but he also knew very well that Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor was dragging his seriously injured body to fight him, and being suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm could only exert the power of the Double Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

And at the last moment, if he hadn't had to burst out with a blow comparable to that of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and forcibly confront the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he wouldn't have fallen so quickly.

If he was allowed to fight against the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor at his true peak, he might not be able to win.

Yuanfeng Dao Ancestor fell and died, and the Liuli Sect did not send Dao Ancestor out again.

Clearly, they were afraid.

Knowing that the Blood Demon General had the invincible true ancestor's combat power, and he had also mastered half of the supreme spear path, sending the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor would also be sent to death.

Could it be that the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor was also sent?

But even the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor is difficult to exert too strong combat power, and even if he can suppress the Blood Demon General, it is difficult to kill the Blood Demon General.

And with the passage of time, the Blood Demon General can completely consume a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

There are only a few Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Liuli Sect, and no one is willing to sacrifice themselves.

Therefore, the Dao Ancestors of the Liuli Sect have not recovered anymore, and they have given up on keeping the boundary stone.

Subsequently, General Bloody joined the ranks of besieging and killing the Liuli Sect.

In a short period of time, almost all the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect fell, and almost all the true ancestors of the Dark God Temple were killed.

"Look for the Boundary Stone!"

The bloody general ordered.

A large number of Black Wind Mountain True Ancestors rushed into the Liuli Sect, and while collecting the spoils, they were also looking for boundary stones.

Several important places of the Liuli Sect were breached by the generals of the Black Wind Mountain, and the existence of the boundary stone was soon found in a mysterious space.

At the same time, they vaguely sensed the sleeping place of the Dao Ancestors of the Liuli Sect, but they didn't bother, they didn't want to find death yet.

The boundary stone was found, and almost all the resources of the Liuli Sect were collected.

Immediately. One by one, the True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain performed the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, leaving this space that was about to be shattered, and returned to the Wind King's Small Realm.

Soon after.

One by one, the true ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force descended on the Liuli Sect, and when they saw the ruined Liuli Sect, they immediately regretted it.

"It's too late, the Liuli Sect has been destroyed, and the boundary stone must have been taken away!"

"To be able to destroy the Liuli Sect in such a short period of time, it must have been done by the Upper Triple Heaven Force, which force is it?"

"I sensed the breath of the bloody general, and the other party left in a hurry, and he didn't completely get rid of the breath!"

"I guess there's no need to be clear, anyway, if we really want to investigate, we can still find out. It's just that I didn't expect Black Wind Mountain to move so fast, and it actually entered the Liuli Sect one step ahead of us and took away the boundary stone!"

"Hmph, if we can't find the headquarters of Black Wind Mountain, otherwise we must destroy it!"

"Destroy the Black Wind Mountain, and you dare to talk about it here, I remember that the Dao Ancestors said that the Black Wind Mountain is at least an eightfold heaven force, and you are just a sevenfold heaven force, and you dare to say that you will destroy the Black Wind Mountain?"

The True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force chatted for a while, and then left one by one.

Obviously, they also gave up the boundary stone.

Although it was a pity, there was no way, they couldn't find the headquarters of Black Wind Mountain, and they couldn't enter the small realm of Black Wind Mountain.

So, they can only give up.

------------------

The Wind King's Small Realm.

When the true ancestors return here, the next step is to reward meritorious deeds.

The first is to share the countless true ancestors and sect resources of the Liuli Sect, and after sharing them carefully, every true ancestor can obtain a large number of resources.

Finally, there's the main event, which is the Boundary Stone.

This time it was a collective task of Black Wind Mountain, according to the rules, half of the boundary stones were confiscated and put into the treasure house of Black Wind Mountain, and it will be used to cultivate the geniuses of Black Wind Mountain in the future.

The other half is used to distribute to many generals, peak masters, and true ancestors.

"There are 3 million boundary stones, and this is the first time I've seen so many boundary stones!"

The bloody general was also shocked.

In the domain realm, the boundary stones are all traded on a case-by-case basis, and it is not easy for even the Dao Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force to get a few boundary stones!

He used to have only a few boundary stones, but now there are more than 3 million boundary stones here!

More than 1,500,000 boundary stones were put into storage, and the remaining boundary stones were taken out and distributed.

Even on a per capita basis, each person can be allocated several boundary stones.

However, the general must have more boundary stones, followed by the peak master, and the other true ancestors the least.

Of course, some true ancestors whose combat power is comparable to that of the peak lord can also get a lot of boundary stones.

After half a day, the assignment was finally confirmed.

Ye Tian had a full 502 boundary stones, and so many boundary stones were enough for him to cultivate many true geniuses.

The other True Ancestors also didn't mean anything to the number of boundary stones they had obtained, and they were all very satisfied

The distribution of boundary stones ended, and each True Ancestor left one by one.

At the same time, the incident of the Black Wind Mountain plundering the boundary stone was also publicized by the forces of the Upper Triple Heavens.
